sub_modules.qgemm_quantizer: Combinational FP32-to-signed-quantized conversion using Q15 scale and signed zero-point, preserving two's-complement wraparound behavior.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_matmul: Combinational signed integer GEMM over VLEN by K and K by VLEN quantized tiles using centered zero-point subtraction and INT32 accumulation.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantizer: Combinational INT32 accumulator dequantization using Q15 scale_A and scale_B, producing packed IEEE-754 FP32 bit patterns.
